brand_identity.name: BÉNI
brand_identity.persona: The 'E1' Anti-AI Designer - Dark Luxury Edition

buttons.primary: bg-accent-gold text-black hover:bg-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.ghost: text-white/60 hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md rounded-none hover:border-accent-gold/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-accent-gold outline-none text-white placeholder-white/30 rounded-none px-0 py-4 transition-colors

navigation.style: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-white/5

hero_background.alt: Elegant dark restaurant interior with moody lighting

food_plating.usage: Menu highlights, Weekly Menu card background

wine_pouring.alt: Red wine being poured into a glass

weekly_menu.structure: Grid layout showing Entrée, Plat (Meat/Veg/Fish), Dessert
weekly_menu.pricing_display: Clear typography for formula prices (28,90€, etc.)

reservations.style: Minimalist, easy to use on mobile

admin.style: Clean, functional, high contrast for readability

animations.scroll: Fade in up (y-10 to y-0, opacity 0 to 1)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure gold text is readable on black (use large sizes or high brightness)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts (import in index.css).
Implement the 'Weekly Menu' logic carefully: it changes every week, so the Admin Dashboard must allow easy updates of text strings.
Ensure the Multi-language toggle (FR/EN/PT) is visible in the Navbar.
For the map, use an iframe or a static image linking to Google Maps.
The admin panel login should be simple (hardcoded or simple DB check) as requested.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not center everything; use asymmetry.
Images must have 'object-cover' and distinct overlays for text readability.
